{"command": "python3 -c "
import json
with open('.crust_sessions/sessions.json') as f:
    sessions = json.load(f)

# Find the most recently edited session
sessions.sort(key=lambda s: s['edited_at'], reverse=True)
session = sessions[0]

print(f\"Session: {session['name']}\")
print(f\"ID: {session['id']}\")
print(f\"Created: {session['created_at']}\")
print(f\"Last edited: {session['edited_at']}\")
print(f\"Total messages: {len(session['messages'])}\")
print()
print('─' * 60)
print('CONVERSATION HISTORY:')
print('─' * 60)

for i, msg in enumerate(session['messages']):
    role = msg['role']
    content = msg.get('content', '')
    tool_calls = msg.get('tool_calls', [])
    
    if role == 'system':
        print(f\"\n[{i+1}] SYSTEM PROMPT\")
        print(content[:200] + '...' if len(content) > 200 else content)
    elif role == 'user':
        print(f\"\n[{i+1}] USER\")
        print(content.strip())
    elif role == 'assistant':
        print(f\"\n[{i+1}] ASSISTANT\")
        if content.strip():
            preview = content.strip()[:300]
            print(preview + ('...' if len(content.strip()) > 300 else ''))
        if tool_calls:
            for tc in tool_calls:
                fn = tc['function']['name']
                args = tc['function']['arguments']
                print(f\"  [Tool call: {fn}] {args[:100]}...\")
    elif role == 'tool':
        name = msg.get('name', 'unknown')
        print(f\"\n[{i+1}] TOOL RESULT ({name})\")
        preview = content[:200]
        print(preview + ('...' if len(content) > 200 else ''))
"", "timeout": 10}
